goal: Make the sample130 threat reserve combat-aware: multiple enemy owners arriving at the same planet fight each other first, so reserve against (top1_enemy - top2_enemy) instead of the sum. Reduces over-reservation / passivity in 4P brawls without lowering safety vs a single attacker.
change: In _threat_reserve_source_budget, enemy threat per planet changed from sum of all enemy arrivals to net surviving hostile force = top1_enemy_owner - top2_enemy_owner over the window.
Single inbound enemy: unchanged (top2=0). Multiple enemies: relaxed because they cancel. Still a hard source-budget constraint.
note: Smoke on seeds 1657384936,53351919 is identical to sample130 (no multi-enemy arrival there); the effect only shows on brawl boards.
